name: Show Version History
title: Show Version History
description: Show all versions of the selected device or software through time-travel proxy chain
queryText:
LET node = DOCUMENT(@startNode)
LET proxyKey = SPLIT(node._key, '-')[0]
LET isDevice = IS_SAME_COLLECTION('Device', node) OR IS_SAME_COLLECTION('DeviceProxyIn', node) OR IS_SAME_COLLECTION('DeviceProxyOut', node)
LET isSoftware = IS_SAME_COLLECTION('Software', node) OR IS_SAME_COLLECTION('SoftwareProxyIn', node) OR IS_SAME_COLLECTION('SoftwareProxyOut', node)
LET proxyIn = isDevice ? DOCUMENT(CONCAT('DeviceProxyIn/', proxyKey)) : (isSoftware ? DOCUMENT(CONCAT('SoftwareProxyIn/', proxyKey)) : null)
FILTER proxyIn != null
FOR version, edge IN 1..1 OUTBOUND proxyIn hasVersion
  SORT edge.created DESC
  RETURN version

name: Show Installed Software
title: Show Installed Software
description: Show all software installed on the selected device
queryText:
LET node = DOCUMENT(@startNode)
LET proxyKey = SPLIT(node._key, '-')[0]
LET proxyOut = DOCUMENT(CONCAT('DeviceProxyOut/', proxyKey))
FILTER proxyOut != null
FOR swProxy, e IN 1..1 OUTBOUND proxyOut hasDeviceSoftware
  FOR sw, ve IN 1..1 OUTBOUND swProxy hasVersion
    FILTER ve.expired == 9223372036854775807
    RETURN sw

name: Show Device Location
title: Show Device Location
description: Show the location of the selected device
queryText:
LET node = DOCUMENT(@startNode)
LET proxyKey = SPLIT(node._key, '-')[0]
LET proxyOut = DOCUMENT(CONCAT('DeviceProxyOut/', proxyKey))
FILTER proxyOut != null
FOR loc IN 1..1 OUTBOUND proxyOut hasLocation
  RETURN loc

name: Show Connected Devices
title: Show Connected Devices
description: Show all devices connected to the selected device via network connections
queryText:
LET node = DOCUMENT(@startNode)
LET proxyKey = SPLIT(node._key, '-')[0]
LET proxyOut = DOCUMENT(CONCAT('DeviceProxyOut/', proxyKey))
FILTER proxyOut != null
FOR neighbor, edge IN 1..1 ANY proxyOut hasConnection
  RETURN DISTINCT neighbor

name: Show Taxonomy Classification
title: Show Taxonomy Classification
description: Show the taxonomy class(es) the selected device or software is classified as
queryText:
LET node = DOCUMENT(@startNode)
FILTER IS_SAME_COLLECTION('Device', node) OR IS_SAME_COLLECTION('Software', node)
FOR cls, edge IN 1..1 OUTBOUND node type
  RETURN cls

name: Show Tenant Neighborhood
title: Show Tenant Neighborhood
description: Expand the full 2-hop neighborhood of the selected node within its tenant boundary
queryText:
LET node = DOCUMENT(@startNode)
FOR v, e, p IN 1..2 ANY node
  hasConnection, hasLocation, hasDeviceSoftware, hasVersion, type
  RETURN DISTINCT v
